'''鈭歵h-y-z''' ('''kathayaz''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zoomorphize|zoomorphize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-y-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zoomorphize|zoomorphize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-y-z
|-
! Lemma
| kathayaz
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithayaz|thithayaz]] || [[word:jithayaz|jithayaz]] || [[word:shithayaz|shithayaz]] || [[word:kithayaz|kithayaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthayaz|thuthuthayaz]] || [[word:jujuthayaz|jujuthayaz]] || [[word:shushuthayaz|shushuthayaz]] || [[word:kukuthayaz|kukuthayaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthayaz|thuthayaz]] || [[word:juthayaz|juthayaz]] || [[word:shuthayaz|shuthayaz]] || [[word:kuthayaz|kuthayaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthayaz|thuthayaz]] || [[word:juthayaz|juthayaz]] || [[word:shuthayaz|shuthayaz]] || [[word:kuthayaz|kuthayaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethayaz|thethayaz]] || [[word:jethayaz|jethayaz]] || [[word:shethayaz|shethayaz]] || [[word:kethayaz|kethayaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothothayaz|thothothayaz]] || [[word:jojothayaz|jojothayaz]] || [[word:shoshothayaz|shoshothayaz]] || [[word:kokothayaz|kokothayaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothayaz|thothayaz]] || [[word:jothayaz|jothayaz]] || [[word:shothayaz|shothayaz]] || [[word:kothayaz|kothayaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothayaz|thothayaz]] || [[word:jothayaz|jothayaz]] || [[word:shothayaz|shothayaz]] || [[word:kothayaz|kothayaz]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:thayaz|thayaz]] || [[word:thayaz|thayaz]] || [[word:thayaz|thayaz]] || [[word:thayaz|thayaz]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:thayaz|thayaz]] || [[word:thayaz|thayaz]] || [[word:thayaz|thayaz]] || [[word:thayaz|thayaz]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayaz|thayaz]] || [[word:thayaz|thayaz]] || [[word:thayaz|thayaz]] || [[word:thayaz|thayaz]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayaz|thayaz]] || [[word:thayaz|thayaz]] || [[word:thayaz|thayaz]] || [[word:thayaz|thayaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙thayaz|th忙thayaz]] || [[word:j忙thayaz|j忙thayaz]] || [[word:sh忙thayaz|sh忙thayaz]] || [[word:k忙thayaz|k忙thayaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathayaz|thathathayaz]] || [[word:jajathayaz|jajathayaz]] || [[word:shashathayaz|shashathayaz]] || [[word:kakathayaz|kakathayaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathayaz|thathayaz]] || [[word:jathayaz|jathayaz]] || [[word:shathayaz|shathayaz]] || [[word:kathayaz|kathayaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathayaz|thathayaz]] || [[word:jathayaz|jathayaz]] || [[word:shathayaz|shathayaz]] || [[word:kathayaz|kathayaz]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shathayaz|shathayaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshathayaz|goshathayaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishathayaz|gokishathayaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shathayazn眉|shathayazn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshathayaznkn眉|goshathayaznkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishathayazn眉|gokishathayazn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shathayazsh毛|shathayazsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshathayaznksh毛|goshathayaznksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishathayazsh毛|gokishathayazsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathayazro|shathayazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathayaznkro|goshathayaznkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathayazro|gokishathayazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shathayazmu|shathayazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathayaznkmu|goshathayaznkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathayazmu|gokishathayazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shathayazsher|shathayazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshathayaznksher|goshathayaznksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishathayazsher|gokishathayazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shathayazng|shathayazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshathayaznkng|goshathayaznkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishathayazng|gokishathayazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shathayazya|shathayazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshathayaznkya|goshathayaznkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishathayazya|gokishathayazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shathayazyam|shathayazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshathayaznkyam|goshathayaznkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishathayazyam|gokishathayazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathayazn眉sh毛|shathayazn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathayaznkn眉sh毛|goshathayaznkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathayazn眉sh毛|gokishathayazn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathayazn眉ro|shathayazn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathayaznkn眉ro|goshathayaznkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathayazn眉ro|gokishathayazn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathayazn眉mu|shathayazn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathayaznkn眉mu|goshathayaznkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathayazn眉mu|gokishathayazn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathayazsh毛n眉|shathayazsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathayaznksh毛n眉|goshathayaznksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathayazsh毛n眉|gokishathayazsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathayazsh毛ro|shathayazsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathayaznksh毛ro|goshathayaznksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathayazsh毛ro|gokishathayazsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathayazsh毛mu|shathayazsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathayaznksh毛mu|goshathayaznksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathayazsh毛mu|gokishathayazsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathayazron眉|shathayazron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathayaznkron眉|goshathayaznkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathayazron眉|gokishathayazron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathayazrosh毛|shathayazrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathayaznkrosh毛|goshathayaznkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathayazrosh毛|gokishathayazrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathayazromu|shathayazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathayaznkromu|goshathayaznkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathayazromu|gokishathayazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathayazmun眉|shathayazmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathayaznkmun眉|goshathayaznkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathayazmun眉|gokishathayazmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathayazmush毛|shathayazmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathayaznkmush毛|goshathayaznkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathayazmush毛|gokishathayazmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathayazmuro|shathayazmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathayaznkmuro|goshathayaznkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathayazmuro|gokishathayazmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|17228b0}}
